title: IENE-410 I had nothing to do with girls, and I was a mess until this year, but my Boro family next to the park skipped cram schools and lessons on my way home from school, but it was a hangout for girls who couldn't even go home! I keep showing my breasts and panchira that are too defenseless in front of me, and it's already the limit of Gaman!
overview: A girl carefully raised in a wealthy family. However, my house is strict and I am suffocated every day with only cram schools and lessons. Such girls also had the only place to relax. The shack of an old man who I met in the park looks dirty but gentle. It was called a secret base among the girls. However, one day, suddenly, an old man who was excited by a girl who was too defenseless strips his fangs!
